title: Al-Ma'mun's arrival in Baghdad and assumption of authority there; the abandonment of the 'Alid colour of green and restoration of the traditional 'Abbasid colour of black
description: Al-Ma'mun's arrival in Baghdad and assumption of authority there; the abandonment of the 'Alid colour of green and restoration of the traditional 'Abbasid colour of black. Recorded under the year 203 AH (819–820 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 32.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 32
